name: S-2 fetcher --emit-metadata writes content_hash and fetched_at fields per §2.6 provenance contract
command: mkdir -p cache && printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash\necho new\n' > up.sh && chmod +x up.sh && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/fetcher.sh" --source-id x --fragility-tier high --strategy silent-replace --upstream-stub ./up.sh --cache cache --emit-metadata meta.json && node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("meta.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.content_hash&&j.content_hash.startsWith("sha256:")&&j.fetched_at?0:1)' && echo emitted 1>&2
